title: limniris klamathensis
intro: Limniris klamathensis, also known as Klamathweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. Traditionally, Klamathweed has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Limniris klamathensis include teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
